description: An early but non-blocking precipitating shallow-cloud scenario for later Golden Path extension.
physical_question: When does a shallow warm cloud produce rain, and how do moisture and depth affect rain onset?
learning_goals: Compare precipitating shallow cloud with the non-precipitating baseline.
intended_behavior: A wetter/deeper shallow-cloud case where warm rain may occur after local CM1 validation.
expected_behavior: Rain may form if the cloud becomes deep and moist enough; this remains early but does not block the baseline Golden Path.

controls.label: Low-level humidity
controls.description: Lower-atmosphere moisture relative to the baseline.
controls.cm1_mapping_notes: Future mapping should increase low-level sounding moisture.

controls.label: Cloud depth potential
controls.description: Relative tendency for a cloud to grow deep enough for warm rain.
controls.cm1_mapping_notes: Future mapping should document cap, moisture, and microphysics assumptions.

run_size_presets.label: Quick look
run_size_presets.purpose: Check whether rain behavior is plausible enough for further exploration.
run_size_presets.output_notes: rain onset may require longer output

run_size_presets.label: Deep / overnight
run_size_presets.purpose: Expensive opt-in run for higher-resolution rain-onset structure and smoother timelapse.
run_size_presets.expected_runtime: target roughly 10-12x Standard wall-clock; may take hours locally
run_size_presets.confidence: higher-detail package settings require local/manual validation
run_size_presets.output_notes: 192 x 192 horizontal grid at about 33.333 m, 300 s saved-output cadence, and larger output should be explicit before launch

notes: Warm rain remains early but does not block the baseline Golden Path.

cm1_template.mapping_notes: Placeholder mapping until local CM1 validation; do not claim precipitation authority before CM1 inspection.

visualization_defaults.camera: orbit view with rain-water field available

non_goals: making warm rain block baseline shallow-cumulus delivery

warnings: Preview estimates are guidance only; CM1 output is the source of truth.
limitations: Warm-rain behavior requires local/manual CM1 validation and may need longer runs.
advanced_settings_notes: Raw microphysics and namelist settings remain advanced/developer-only.
